title: Selona
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Selona''' was the third month of the [[Tapani calendar]]. It followed [[Kelona]], and was followed by [[Expansion Week]] and [[Telona]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-06-XX -->''[[Player's Guide to Tapani]]''
*<!-- 1997-07-28 -->''[[Lords of the Expanse]]''
